WatchlistItem.title: WatchlistItem
WatchlistItem.description: A saved stock comparison pair on the investor's research watchlist.

userId.description: The Firebase Authentication UID of the owner.

anchorStock.description: Ticker symbol of the AI anchor stock.

comparisonStock.description: Ticker symbol of the compared sector stock.

correlationScore.description: Calculated global correlation coefficient between the two stocks.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the item was watched (millisecond epoch).

/watchlists/{watchlistId}.description: A flat root collection representing comparative watchlists across all users.
